title: 15222_Orthogonal_Subspace_Decomposition_for_Generalizable_AI-Generated_Image_Detection
positive_examples: Advances application-driven machine learning by proposing a novel method for detecting AI-generated images.
Holds significant potential for positive social impact by effectively identifying deepfakes and curbing malicious uses of generative models.
negative_examples: Possible misuse of the method to enhance the realism of deepfake generators.
Concerns about the potential for negative impacts that need to be minimized.
